cards.title: Schema and Relationships
cards.governance_note: Define entities, fields, keys, relationships, constraints, and query capabilities.

cards.title: Metadata, Provenance, and Lineage

cards.title: Access, Correction, and Retention
cards.governance_note: Review permissions, correction workflows, appeal paths, retention rules, deletion, interoperability, and representation risk.
